requirements.requirement: A user can be either a donor or a company.
The system must be available in both Spanish and English.
The system must allow registering new users to the system.
The system must be able to authenticate existing users via email.
The system must allow users to log out.
The system must allow logged-in or non-logged-in users to view the profiles of various companies as well as their products.
The system must be able to save all images of all products/users of the system.
A company must be able to modify its public profile/page at any time, as well as preview it while editing.
A company must have access to the system dashboard to use internal functionalities and additional information (statistics, values, etc.).
A company must be able to register a product and have it visible on its public profile/page.
A company must be able to register a route to link it to its products.
A user must be able to return a product registered in a company using its routes.
Every product must have a default route in which the user returns it on their own and with their own means.
Every route must have an associated budget (which can be 0) which the user must be able to pay using the system when returning the product.
The system must have an affiliation/plan system for companies that want certain advantages (includes three plans: free, basic, and premium).
The system must be available in different languages (Spanish and English verified by a translator).
The user interface must be intuitive and easy to use for non-technical users (Usability tests with at least 10 representative users achieving a minimum satisfaction score of 8/10).
The system must protect user information through secure authentication (Must pass security audits without critical vulnerabilities).
The system must have an uptime of 99.9% and be able to recover from failures in less than 1 hour.
The system must be easy to maintain and update with clear and complete documentation (Average implementation time for updates and problem resolution not exceeding 2 hours).
The system must be compatible with the most common web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and mobile devices.
The system must be scalable to handle an increase in the number of users and data volume (Capacity to increase server resources and maintain performance with a 50% increase in workload).
Company products/routes/profile can only be editable and accessible by that company.
Users can register via email (using MagicLink) or directly via Google authentication.
Logged-in users can change language between Spanish and English.
Donor users can return any available product in company profiles, selecting the route and making the corresponding payment (which can be 0).

Company users have access to the main dashboard with general profile information (profile completion %, certified status, product count, route count, total products received, chains started, waste avoided).

Company users can edit their public profile fields: Public profile URL, up to four external web addresses, up to six locations (Office, Branch, Recovery Center), Logo and Corporate Image, Description, Sustainability information, and Publish toggle.

Company users can manage products: Create, Edit, Delete. Product fields include: Name, Category/Subcategory, Approximate weight (kg), Approximate dimensions (cm), Up to four images (min 1, max 5MB), Description, Repair service indication, Reward indication, Other brands reception indication, Reception method (routes/company/both), Published status.
Company users can manage routes: Create, Edit, Delete. Route fields include: Name, Reception channel, Market zone (regions), Reception point, Associated products.
Company users can change their plan at any time (free, basic, premium) and must make the corresponding payment.
The route of a return must be of the same product that is being returned.
The attribute 'name' cannot be repeated among Companies.
The attribute 'name' cannot be repeated among Products of the same Company.
